explanation: This feature activates on informal to semi-formal web content and online communication, including blog posts, forum discussions, news snippets, and personal online exchanges.
harmful_reason: The content spans various benign topics like retail, healthcare, donations, and online discourse without any consistent harmful themes or dangerous subject matter.
